name: My employer uninsured after my Boise injury, what do I do?
description: File with Industrial Commission; they cover via fund.[4]

mainEntity.name: My employer uninsured after my Boise injury, what do I do?

acceptedAnswer.text: File with Industrial Commission; they cover via fund.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: File claim with Idaho Industrial Commission; they notify employer and enforce insurance or pay from uninsured fund.[4] Report within 60 days.[4] Key factors: Prove uninsured status; injury details. Practical guidance: Submit to Boise office; Commission handles compliance. You still get benefits.[4] Don't delay.[5]
